ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director of the movie */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the movie */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the movie's IMDB page */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie's poster image */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie's trailer */,
  "plot_summary" TEXT /* A brief summary of the movie's plot */,
  "country" TEXT /* The country where the movie was produced */,
  "language" TEXT /* The language of the movie */,
  "budget" REAL /* The budget of the movie */,
  "revenue" REAL /* The revenue generated by the movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* The release date of the movie */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Whether the movie is featured on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Notable awards won by the director */,
  "imdb_link" TEXT /* Link to the director's IMDB page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the actor */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the actor */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the actor */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Notable awards won by the actor */,
  "imdb_link" TEXT /* Link to the actor's IMDB page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_actor" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (for hierarchical genres) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_parent_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genre" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* The date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "favorite_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's favorite genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_favorite_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("favorite_genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review of the movie by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* The date the rating was given */,
  "is_spoiler" INTEGER /* Whether the review contains spoilers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie in the watchlist */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* The date the movie was added to the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorite_movies" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite movie */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who marked the movie as favorite */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the favorite movie */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* The date the movie was marked as a favorite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorite_movies_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorite_movies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the recommendation */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended movie */,
  "recommended_date" TEXT /* The date the recommendation was made */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* The algorithm used to generate the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics data point */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., user engagement, movie ratings) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* The timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the metric (e.g., user, movie) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)
